title: A Blessing, by Kohenet Ilana Joy Streit
author: Kohenet Ilana Joy Streit

coauthors.name: Kohenet Ilana Joy Streit
coauthors.bio:
Based in mid-Hudson Valley, New York, Kohenet Ilana Joy Streit is a working artist, peacemaker, and a weaver of blessings (through poem, prayer, and song).

Thank you for honoring and contributing to her work in any or all of the following ways:
  • Share her work (with attribution of course) to expand its reach
  • Let Ilana know how you are using or sharing this work
  • Make a one-time financial contribution or join her community on Patreon.

excerpt: A blessing for growth in springtime
content:
A Blessing
may love and beauty
flow through you

may anger trickle and pour
out of you

may music enfold you

may streamers of joy surround you
mosquitoes eat to their fill
      before they get to you

may you wake up in the morning
   a little lighter
   a little surer
voices of strength and knowing
   a little louder

pathways of courage and chutzpah
   a little deeper
oceans of joy and belonging
   more your home
gardens of playfulness and creativity
   more familiar with your hands
in their soil

This prayer-poem was written by Kohenet Ilana Joy Streit in April 2021.
